channel.title: System Resource Hub
channel.description: Last 10 notes on System Resource Hub

item.title: System Resource Hub
item.description: System Resource Hub Tools and resources for systems—organized, usable, and actually helpful. Start here → Browse Tools.

item.title: Simply Plural Alternatives
item.description: Replacing Simply Plural: What to Use Instead There is no perfect one-to-one replacement for Simply Plural.

item.title: Philosophy
item.description: Philosophy Overview System Resource Hub exists to make finding tools easier.

item.title: Simply Plural Discontinuation
item.description: Simply Plural is Shutting down TL;DR Simply Plural is being discontinued.

item.title: Ampersand
item.description: Ampersand is a plural system management tool for tracking members, fronting, and system information, with a focus on simplicity and ease of use.

item.title: Tools
item.description: A curated list of tools and guides for plural systems, including fronting, tracking, journaling, and system organization.

item.title: Ourcana
item.description: Ourcana is a system management and profile tool that allows plural systems to create public or private profiles for members, track fronting, and organize system information.

item.title: Submission Guidelines
item.description: Submission Guidelines If you’re submitting something to be listed here, keep it simple. This site is curated. Not everything gets in.

item.title: About
item.description: About System Resource Hub System Resource Hub exists for a pretty simple reason: finding tools for plural systems shouldn’t be this hard.
